overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets with heavy traffic, and passes towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with neon advertisements

events.description: character crosses yellow striped crosswalk and steps onto opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts and towering digital billboards

entered.detail: large purple neon sign reading WET DREAM mounted on building facade
large yellow digital billboard displaying a face advertisement
towering futuristic buildings with glass and steel facades creating an urban canyon
elevated metal walkway structure connecting two buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of yellow crosswalk stripes as the character crosses a street in a dense cyberpunk city. Walking along the sidewalk, the character passes beneath towering skyscrapers adorned with vibrant neon signs including a prominent purple WET DREAM sign on the right and large digital billboards on the left. The street is relatively quiet with few pedestrians, and the camera moves steadily forward through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with traffic infrastructure

events.description: character slows pace while approaching the intersection with moving traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the intersection, navigating past street furniture and signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving down the street toward the intersection

entered.detail: circular corporate logo signage on the building facade indicating Arasaka presence
red metal structure spanning the street with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
large overhead roadway or monorail track running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the street approaching a major intersection. The WET DREAM sign and initial billboards pass out of view as new elements enter including an Arasaka corporate logo on the left and a prominent red traffic light gantry ahead. The street opens up slightly, revealing an elevated highway structure on the right. Traffic density increases with futuristic vehicles moving through the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character stops at crosswalk to wait for stream of futuristic vehicles to pass
character begins crossing the street between moving cars

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, then carefully crossing the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: blue futuristic coupe driving through the intersection
red sports car stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes
row of commercial buildings with neon signage on the far side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and stops at the yellow striped crosswalk to wait for dense traffic to pass. Various futuristic cars including a blue coupe and red sports car move through the intersection. After waiting, the character begins crossing the street toward the opposite side, where new buildings with distinct neon signage become visible. The traffic light gantry moves to the left as the character advances across the wide intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with shopfronts under building overhangs

events.description: character reaches opposite sidewalk and enters covered walkway area

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk beneath building overhangs, passing neon-lit shopfronts

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: covered walkway with metal roofing and neon underlighting protecting the sidewalk
row of commercial shops with glass windows and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk beneath protective building overhangs. The environment shifts to a more sheltered semi-covered layout with shopfronts on the right displaying various neon signs. The street traffic is now behind and to the left, with the character moving through a covered pedestrian zone featuring reflective wet pavement and vertical neon lighting elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense cyberpunk urban canyon that transitions from an open street into a sheltered pedestrian zone. It begins by crossing yellow stripes and moving past towering skyscrapers adorned with vibrant neon signs, including a prominent purple WET DREAM display. As the camera advances toward a major intersection, the initial billboards give way to an Arasaka corporate logo and a red traffic light gantry while an elevated highway opens up to the right. The scene then pauses at a wide crosswalk to let a stream of futuristic blue and red cars pass before the camera pushes forward across the intersection toward new neon-lit buildings. Finally, the environment shifts beneath protective building overhangs, moving the character into a semi-covered pedestrian area with reflective wet pavement and vertical neon lighting.
